children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established a student loan insurance account (in this section referred to as the “Account”) which shall be available without fiscal year limitation to the Secretary for making payments in connection with the collection and default of loans insured under this subpart by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), all amounts received by the Secretary as premium charges for insurance and as receipts, earnings, or proceeds derived from any claim or other assets acquired by the Secretary in connection with his operations under this subpart, and any other moneys, property, or assets derived by the Secretary from the operations of the Secretary in connection with this section, shall be deposited in the Account.

children.label: B
children.text: With respect to amounts described in subparagraph (A) that are received by the Secretary for fiscal year 1993 and subsequent fiscal years, the Secretary may, before depositing such amounts in the Account, reserve from the amounts each such fiscal year not more than $1,000,000 for obligation under .section 292h(d) of this title

children.heading: Expenditures
children.label: 3 Expenditures
children.text: All payments in connection with the default of loans insured by the Secretary under this subpart shall be paid from the Account.

children.heading: Contingent authority for issuance of notes or other obligations
children.label: b Contingent authority for issuance of notes or other obligations
children.text: If at any time the moneys in the Account are insufficient to make payments in connection with the collection or default of any loan insured by the Secretary under this subpart, the Secretary of the Treasury may lend the Account such amounts as may be necessary to make the payments involved, subject to the Federal Credit Reform Act of 1990 [ et seq.].2 U.S.C. 661
